python - <<'PY'
from django.contrib.auth.models import User
from django.contrib.contenttypes.models import ContentType
from django.contrib.admin.sites import AdminSite
from django.contrib.admin.options import ModelAdmin
from django.db import models

class MyModel(models.Model):
    data = models.JSONField()

site = AdminSite(name='admin')
admin_class = type('MyModelAdmin', (ModelAdmin,), {})
site.register(MyModel, admin_class)

user = User.objects.create_superuser(username='admin', password='password', email='admin@example.com')
content_type = ContentType.objects.get_for_model(MyModel)
obj = MyModel(data={"foo": "bar"})
obj.save()
site.login(user)
response = site._build_app_index(request=user, model_admin=admin_class(content_type.model_class(), site))
print(response.content.decode())
PY
